description: The existing FeedAction union in types.ts (line 109-119) already contains FilterApplied and FilterCleared variants that take visibleNoteIds as payload. The spec's REQ-TAG-010 step 3 says 'Emit FilterApplied action to update the feed view' but does not clarify whether this reuses the existing FilterApplied action (which takes pre-computed visibleNoteIds) as-is, or extends it with additional filter state data. The spec should explicitly state whether the existing action variants are sufficient or need modification.

evidence.snippet:
| { kind: 'FilterApplied'; visibleNoteIds: readonly string[] }
| { kind: 'FilterCleared'; visibleNoteIds: readonly string[] }
